data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding subscriber-to-endpoint ownership, which is a critical requirement for ensuring that notifications are sent only to valid subscriptions and endpoints. The lack of concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm this requirement indicates a significant gap in the validation process. Specifically, the exploratory step instruction explicitly calls for validation of this requirement, but no evidence was presented to support its satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence confirming subscriber-to-endpoint ownership checks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add checks for subscriber-to-endpoint ownership
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that notifications are only sent to valid subscriptions and owner-linked endpoints.
